Help.StatusLineText: "Creates a new data file, to be used in the Data Manager"
"Opens an existing data file, to be used in the Data Manager"
"Sets the next window as the active window"
"Opens the Progress window containing AIMMS and solver statistics"
"Opens the Message window containing AIMMS and solver messages"

MenuItem.Name: Additional Product Properties (&ECP/SI) File
MenuItem.Comment: This will generate an Excel spreadsheet with the Additional Properties calculated by using ECP/SI

Help.StatusLineText: "Convert an existing data file to multiple individual case files"
"This will export a test run data file"

Help.Tooltip: "This will create three templates used for Unit Monitoring."

MenuItem.Name: Go to Page "Additional Product Properties at Specified Cut Points"

Help.Tooltip: "Go to Page Additional Product Properties at Specified Cut Points"

MenuItem.Name: Go to Page "Actual Products: Property Estimation based on ECP and SI"

Help.Tooltip: "Open Page for Actual Products: Property Estimation based on ECP and SI"

MenuItem.Name: Generate Report: File for "Actual Product: Property Estimation based on ECP and SI"

Help.Tooltip: "Generate Report: File for Actual Product: Property Estimation based on ECP and SI"
